title: Pacific Biosciences of California Inc (PACB) Q3 2024 Earnings Report Preview: What To Expect
text: Pacific Biosciences of California Inc (PACB) released Q3 2024 earnings on November 7, 2024. The consensus estimate for Q3 2024 revenue was $41.95 million, and earnings were expected to come in at -$0.24 per share. Pacific Biosciences reported $39.97 million in revenue for the quarter ended September 2024, representing a year-over-year decline of 28.2%. EPS of -$0.17 for the same period compares to -$0.27 a year ago. The company reported an 11% revenue increase in Q3 2024 compared to the previous quarter, with total revenue reaching $40 million. Revenue components included Instrument Revenue of $16.8 million (a decrease of 52% from Q3 2023), Consumables Revenue of $18.5 million (increased 10% year over year), and Service and Other Revenue of $4.7 million, compared to $4.1 million in Q3 2023. Fourth-quarter 2024 revenue is expected to be flat to slightly up compared to Q3 2024, suggesting limited short-term growth.
